App.title: Top Trip
App.description: Next.js chatbot template using the AI SDK and Gemini.

Auth.signInDescription: Use your email and password to sign in
Auth.signUpDescription: Create an account with your email and password

History.title: History
History.loginToSave: Login to save and revisit previous chats!
History.confirmDescription: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your chat and remove it from our servers.

Chat.uploadFailed: Failed to upload file, please try again!
Chat.placeholder: Tell me the destination and dates…
Chat.waitModel: Please wait for the model to finish its response!
Chat.suggest1Action: Create a complete 5-day itinerary for Praia, Cabo Verde.
Chat.suggest2Action: I want an itinerary for Lisbon this weekend and also the weather forecast.

TripIntake.title: Trip details
TripIntake.subtitle: Fill this in so I can search flights accurately.

PreLogin.heroSubtitle: You share the destination. AI delivers the full itinerary.

Overview.heroTitle: Plan and book flights in minutes.
Overview.heroSubtitle: Search options, check flight status, pick seats and create reservations in a fast, polished chat experience.
Overview.feature1Desc: Prompts and actions to go from zero to a reservation with less friction.
Overview.feature2Desc: Seats, payment and confirmation in clear, step-by-step UI.
Overview.feature3Desc: History, attachments and context so you can pick up where you left off.
Overview.text: This is an open source Chatbot template powered by the Google Gemini model built with Next.js and the AI SDK by Vercel. It uses the {streamText} function in the server and the {useChat} hook on the client to create a seamless chat experience.
Overview.learnMore: You can learn more about the AI SDK by visiting the {docs}.

Onboarding.title: Let’s personalize your trip.
Onboarding.subtitle: Answer 4 quick questions. The AI uses this to tailor your itinerary to your profile.
Onboarding.qLikes: What do you truly enjoy on trips?
Onboarding.qLikesPlaceholder: e.g. beach, local food, museums, nature…
Onboarding.qAvoidPlaceholder: e.g. crowds, long hikes, late nights…
Onboarding.qLikesHint: This helps the AI avoid suggestions that don’t fit you.
Onboarding.saveFailed: Could not save. Please try again.

Payments.useSavedInfo: Use your saved information for this transaction
Payments.enterMagicWord: Enter the magic word to authorize payment. Hint: It rhymes with bercel.
Payments.verifySuccess: Your payment transaction has been verified!
Payments.verifyFail: Unable to verify your payment, please try again!
